services.notes: Large upscale grocery with prepared foods, organic section, pharmacy

services.name: Inova Primary Care - Tysons
services.notes: Primary care practice, accepting new patients, MyChart online portal

services.name: Tysons Dentistry
services.notes: General and cosmetic dentistry, same-day appointments available

services.notes: Full-service veterinary hospital, emergency referrals, boarding available

services.name: McLean Bible Church
services.notes: Large non-denominational church, multiple Sunday services, community programs

services.name: Petco Grooming Salon Tysons

attractions.name: Smithsonian National Air and Space Museum (Udvar-Hazy Center)
attractions.description: Massive annex with Space Shuttle Discovery, SR-71 Blackbird, hundreds of aircraft
attractions.frequency: Daily 10:00-17:30, free admission, parking fee applies

attractions.name: Great Falls Park
attractions.description: Dramatic waterfalls on the Potomac River, hiking trails, rock climbing
attractions.frequency: Daily dawn to dusk, vehicle entrance fee

attractions.name: Mount Vernon (George Washington's Estate)
attractions.description: First president's plantation estate, museum, gardens, river views

attractions.name: W&OD Trail
attractions.description: 45-mile paved rail trail from Arlington to Purcellville, cycling and walking

attractions.name: Tysons Galleria
attractions.description: Upscale shopping mall with Neiman Marcus, Saks, luxury brands

attractions.name: Reston Town Center
attractions.description: Walkable mixed-use area with 30+ restaurants, seasonal events, fountain square
attractions.frequency: Restaurants open daily, seasonal farmers market

attractions.name: Wolf Trap National Park for the Performing Arts
attractions.description: Only national park dedicated to performing arts, outdoor amphitheater
attractions.frequency: Summer season Jun-Sep, indoor performances year-round

attractions.name: Washington DC National Mall
attractions.description: All major monuments, museums, and memorials, 30 min Metro ride from Tysons

attractions.name: Shenandoah National Park
attractions.description: Blue Ridge Mountains, Skyline Drive, 500+ miles of hiking trails
attractions.frequency: Day or weekend trip, best spring and fall

attractions.name: Nationals Park
attractions.description: Home of Washington Nationals MLB baseball, accessible via Metro
